_meta.name: Scope Try/Catch Pattern
_meta.description: Try scope containing main logic, Catch scope that runs only when Try fails or times out. The standard error handling pattern for Power Automate flows.

placeholders.{{TRY_ACTION_NAME}}: Name of the main action inside Try scope
placeholders.{{ERROR_ACTION_NAME}}: Name of the error handling action inside Catch scope

_notes.runAfter_statuses: Catch uses ["Failed", "TimedOut"] to fire only on errors. Finally uses all 4 statuses to always run.
_notes.result_function: Use result('ScopeName') inside Catch to access error details from the failed scope.
_notes.nesting: Scopes can be nested. Inner scope failures bubble to outer scope unless caught.
